minimum_requirements.windows: 10 or newer for the documented PowerShell local CLI path

warnings: stable local CLI runtime manifest; not a production cloud runtime
install.ps1 is served only as a GitHub Release asset, not from yonerai.com
verified bootstrap command checks install.ps1.sha256 before script execution
GitHub latest/download is the stable bootstrap entry and resolves to versioned GitHub Release assets
release ZIP SHA256 must match this manifest before extraction
production signature verification is not available in this public manifest
no production signing key or production trust store is included
install-local.ps1 runs only from the verified GitHub Release archive
existing or partial install targets require -Repair, -Force, -CleanRetry, or a different -InstallDir
no PATH mutation is performed by default; -SetPath is explicit
yonerai.com/install is a command page only and must not serve local PC installer files
local memory remains local by default and local-to-cloud sync is disabled by default
